name: D2 (Modern Diagram Scripting Language)
pricing_notes: Open source (MPL-2.0); Terrastruct; D2 TALA layout engine is commercial

auth.notes: TALA layout engine API key for best auto-layout; d2 itself free

performance.notes: Go CLI; layout engine impacts performance; dagre fast, TALA slower but better

agent_readiness.notes: Text-to-diagram language with better expressiveness than Mermaid. `d2 diagram.d2 output.svg`. Nodes, edges, shapes, containers (groups), SQL tables, classes, sequences. Multiple layout engines: dagre (default, free), elk, TALA (best, commercial). --theme. --dark-theme. --watch for live preview. Markdown in labels. Icon support. Better than Mermaid for complex architecture diagrams. VS Code extension, JetBrains plugin. Go API for embedding.

gotchas: TALA layout engine (best results) requires commercial license
Less ecosystem integration than Mermaid (GitHub doesn't render natively)
best_when: Complex architecture diagrams where Mermaid's layout is insufficient
Technical documentation requiring precise, beautiful diagrams
System architecture diagrams with SQL tables and class diagrams
Teams willing to pay for TALA's superior auto-layout
avoid_when: Need GitHub/GitLab native rendering (Mermaid supported, D2 not)
Simple flowcharts where Mermaid is sufficient
Organizations without TALA license for quality layout
summary: D2 is a modern diagram scripting language with superior expressiveness to Mermaid. SQL tables, class diagrams, sequences, containers. Multiple layout engines: dagre (free), TALA (commercial, best quality). `d2 diagram.d2 output.svg` or live --watch mode. Better for complex architecture diagrams where Mermaid's layout fails. Less ecosystem integration than Mermaid (GitHub doesn't render D2 natively).
